why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:store_cookie must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a body-consuming store_cookie decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one official key/payload fixture only and is separate from cookie storage policy, persistence, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_store_cookie_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 10, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x0a.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: Identifier.parse(String), ClientboundStoreCookiePacket(Identifier, byte[]), ClientboundStoreCookiePacket.STREAM_CODEC, ClientboundStoreCookiePacket.PAYLOAD_STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundStoreCookiePacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ClientboundStoreCookiePacket field accessors.
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound store_cookie dispatch/decode.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains resource_pack_push id 0x09, but not store_cookie id 0x0a.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0xa in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound store_cookie packet id 10
